papers.notes: All questions to be answered; scientific calculator required
All questions to be answered; scientific calculator required

topics.description: Function concepts: domain, range, inverse, composite functions, modulus function relationships
subtopics: Function, domain, range (image set), one-one function
Inverse function and composition of functions
Relationship between y = f(x) and y = |f(x)| for linear, quadratic, trigonometric functions
Explain why a given function is/is not a function
Find inverse of a one-one function
Sketch graphs showing relationship between function and its inverse

topics.description: Maximum/minimum values, sketching graphs, conditions for roots, solving equations and inequalities
subtopics: Find maximum or minimum value of quadratic function
Use max/min to sketch graph or determine range for given domain
Conditions for roots: two real, two equal, no real roots
Solve quadratic equations for real roots
Find solution set for quadratic inequalities

topics.description: Absolute value equations and inequalities, cubic equations, substitution methods
subtopics: Solve |ax + b| = c and |ax + b| = |cx + d|
Solve inequalities |ax + b| > c, |ax + b| ≤ c, |ax + b| ≤ |cx + d|
Use substitution to form and solve quadratic equations
Sketch cubic polynomials in factorised form y = k(x-a)(x-b)(x-c)

topics.description: Operations with indices and surds, rationalising denominators
Remainder theorem, factor theorem, finding factors, solving cubic equations
Solve simultaneous equations in two unknowns
Properties and graphs of log and exponential functions, laws of logarithms, solving equations
subtopics: Properties and graphs of ln x and eˣ
Graphs of keⁿˣ + a and kln(ax + b)
Laws of logarithms including change of base
Solve equations of form aˣ = b

topics.description: Equation of straight line, transformations to linear form, mid-point, length, parallel/perpendicular conditions
subtopics: Transform to straight line form: y = axⁿ and y = Abˣ
Mid-point and length of a line

topics.description: Arc length, sector area, radian measure
Six trigonometric functions, graphs, identities, solving equations, proving identities
subtopics: Six trigonometric functions: sin, cos, tan, sec, cosec, cot
Graphs of y = a sin(bx) + c, y = a cos(bx) + c, y = a tan(bx) + c
Trigonometric identities: sin²A + cos²A = 1, sec²A = 1 + tan²A, cosec²A = 1 + cot²A

topics.description: Distinguish permutations and combinations, use n! and formulae for arrangements and selections
Binomial theorem, arithmetic and geometric progressions
subtopics: Binomial theorem for (a + b)ⁿ for positive integer n
Arithmetic progressions: nth term and sum
Geometric progressions: nth term and sum
Convergence and sum to infinity of GP

topics.description: Vectors in various forms, position vectors, unit vectors, magnitude, composition and resolution
subtopics: Vector notation: column vectors, AB, ai + bj
Add, subtract vectors, multiply by scalars

topics.description: Differentiation and integration of standard functions, applications to gradients, tangents, normals, stationary points, areas
subtopics: Derivatives of xⁿ (any rational n), sin x, cos x, tan x, eˣ, ln x
Constant multiples, sums, composite functions (chain rule)
Apply differentiation to gradients, tangents, normals
Definite integrals and area under curves
